title: HDFC Ergo is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Ergo is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!
